addon.name: Astral Glass Dice Skin
addon.description: A standalone cosmetic dice skin addon — deep-blue glass dice, unrelated to any RPG system. Texture and dicehit sound files live in this addon's own package folder (assets/textures, assets/sounds/dicehit — dice-box-threejs falls back to its plastic sound set for glass material) and are served via this repo's GitHub raw URL — resolves once committed and pushed.
addon.author: saving-throw
